reference_basis: ROS 2 Jazzy QoS policies: history/depth, reliability, deadline, liveliness, lease duration, and compatibility.

RT-001.summary: Nominal source-to-receipt latency did not meet the predeclared bounds.

RT-002.summary: The 30 Hz publication/deadline requirement was not met on this bench run.

RT-003.summary: Resource and thermal evidence was collected without a reported throttling flag.
